steps.title: Identify the rhetorical goal
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize the order in which the two winners received the award. The answer must highlight the chronological sequence—which comes first and which comes later.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content: Choice B accomplishes this by presenting Raj Reddy's 1994 award first, then explicitly marking Manuel Blum's 1995 award with the word later. This structure and language make the time sequence immediately clear. Choices A, C, and D either name only one recipient, omit the years, or fail to connect both awards in a time relationship. That matches choice B — B is correct.
